mapper.update: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fortune_tree_player ( uuid VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL, level INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, exp INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, free_picks INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, first_done TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, total_deposit BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, total_reward BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, crit_count BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, updated_at_millis BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY (uuid) )
mapper.select: SELECT uuid, level, exp, free_picks AS freePicks, first_done AS firstDone, total_deposit AS totalDeposit, total_reward AS totalReward, crit_count AS critCount, updated_at_millis AS updatedAtMillis FROM fortune_tree_player WHERE uuid = #{uuid}
mapper.update: UPDATE fortune_tree_player SET level = #{level}, exp = #{exp}, free_picks = #{freePicks}, first_done = #{firstDone}, total_deposit = #{totalDeposit}, total_reward = #{totalReward}, crit_count = #{critCount}, updated_at_millis = #{updatedAtMillis} WHERE uuid = #{uuid}
